name: Ice Devil

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The imp has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

text:
# Ice Devil

*Tiny Fiend (Devil), Lawful Evil*

### Actions

**Sting.** Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.
